channel.title: CS-205 Security Fundamentals :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-205 — Security Fundamentals 1 credit Working description Threat identification, authentication, authorization. Modular arithmetic from Block 5 grounds an applied cryptography unit. Principle of least privilege extended explicitly to principle of least data collection. To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
